stock_market.summary: Equity futures climbed 0.8% for the S&P 500 following reports of potential de-escalation in the Iran conflict. European shares up 0.3%. Chip stocks (Samsung, SK Hynix) faced pressure. S&P 500 volatility persists with potential dip to 6150.

art_market.summary: Global art market showed a 4% recovery in 2025 to $59.6 billion. U.S. art market auction sales jumped 23% in 2025, rebounding for the first time since 2022. Focus on high-end works ($10M+) and quality/provenance.
